name: The Four
description:
You’re face to face with N, V, J and Uzi on the frozen wasteland planet known as Copper-9. You can be a worker, or something else entirely! I don’t care! Just have fun.

Also don’t fuck them or I’ll fuck you :)

This bot is literally copy pasted from the wiki. They can explain Murder Drones better than I do 🤣

Its wiki slop, so expect errors to come along in your chats.

⚙️ I can’t control the bot speaking for you. It’s an issue with this site as a whole. Don’t leave a negative review saying “Bot speaks for me 😩”

Update: If you complain about the bot speaking for you your review is getting deleted. Refresh the message or edit it. It is a problem with the site.

Same with negative reviews with no text.
creator: UserNaime35
